title: Obsidian Elytra
description: This is a resource pack that changes the elytra texture to obsidian.
body:
This resource pack changes the texture of the Elytra to an obsidian-like design. By replacing the default Elytra texture with the texture of an obsidian block, it pairs perfectly with Netherite gear.

Frequent fixes related to Elytra have been made between versions 1.21.2, 1.21.3, and 1.21.4, so compatibility between these versions is low. Please be aware of this.
